settled_conclusion: No robust incremental predictive utility relative to the prespecified kinematic+safety baseline was demonstrated.

blockers.how: Negative-control and confirmatory reports now state that future_leaky_full_window_ipv, ipv_time_shuffle, counterpart_swap, role_flip, and sign_flip match or exceed the primary delta Spearman, and that state_shuffle/wrong_state degradation controls failed. The conclusion is no IPV-specific signal demonstrated.

Cited replication2_status.json. Replication2 used corrected N=53, exactly reproduced the reported-alpha refit direction (+0.136833), and independently reproduced the favorable direction under independent training-tuned analysis (+0.054669).
Reports now state S1 and S2 are exactly the primary 53 cells, S3 has n=6 and null/reverse behavior, and safe_subset_agreement_count=2 is vacuous. Safe-subset robustness support was removed.

Reader-facing wording was downgraded to suggestive, nonsignificant (p=0.30, CI includes 0), non-generalizing (LOSO delta Spearman +0.017), non-IPV-specific favorable direction; robustness not established.
